problems/.filename: clean-slug.md (leetcode number lives in frontmatter, not filename)

companies/.holds: one curated index page per company

rules: Filenames are globally unique so links resolve from anywhere.
Company is a tag (frontmatter 'tags' + 'companies'), never a folder. Do not create company/problems/ subfolders.
To surface a problem on a company page: add the company to tags + companies frontmatter, then add a row to companies/<company>.md. Never duplicate the problem file.
No empty folders, no raw/ in the vault. Raw scrape dumps go in apps/pinterest-practice/raw/.
